description: Replace SerpAPI with Walmart Affiliate API as primary image search, with Open Food Facts secondary fallback and SerpAPI tertiary fallback

credentialRequirements.credentialType: RSA key-pair (Consumer ID + private key + key version)
credentialRequirements.fallbackPlan: Build Edge Function structure and test with mocked responses; Walmart search won't work until keys are configured

userStories.title: Walmart Affiliate API Edge Function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Supabase Edge Function that proxies search requests to the Walmart Affiliate API so the client can fetch product images without exposing credentials.
acceptanceCriteria: New Edge Function `search-products` created at `supabase/functions/search-products/index.ts`
Accepts GET requests with query params: `q` (search term), `num` (max results, default 8)
Authenticates to Walmart Affiliate API using RSA key-pair signature (WM_CONSUMER.ID, WM_SEC.KEY_VERSION, WM_CONSUMER.INTIMESTAMP headers)

Generates WM_SEC.AUTH_SIGNATURE using RSA-SHA256: sign(consumer_id + '
' + timestamp + '
' + key_version + '
', privateKey)
Calls the Walmart Affiliate Search API endpoint: `https://developer.api.walmart.com/api-proxy/service/affil/product/v2/search?query={q}&numItems={num}`
Parses response and maps each product to: `{ url: item.largeImage, thumbnail: item.thumbnailImage, title: item.name }`
Returns JSON: `{ results: [...], source: "walmart" }`
Handles errors gracefully — returns `{ results: [], source: "walmart", error: "..." }` on failure
CORS headers match existing `search-images` function (allow production + localhost origins)
Supabase secrets configured: `WALMART_CONSUMER_ID`, `WALMART_PRIVATE_KEY` (PEM content), `WALMART_KEY_VERSION`
5-second AbortController timeout on the Walmart API call
Lint passes
userStories.testIntensityReason: RSA signature generation and external API integration — must verify auth headers are constructed correctly

userStories.title: Open Food Facts Fallback in Edge Function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the search Edge Function to fall back to Open Food Facts when Walmart returns no results, so grocery items still get product images.
acceptanceCriteria: When Walmart returns zero results, the Edge Function calls Open Food Facts search: `https://world.openfoodfacts.org/cgi/search.pl?search_terms={q}&search_simple=1&action=process&json=1&page_size={num}`
Maps OFF response to same shape: `{ url: product.image_url, thumbnail: product.image_small_url || product.image_url, title: product.product_name }`
Filters out products that have no `image_url`
Returns `{ results: [...], source: "openfoodfacts" }` when OFF results are used
If both Walmart and OFF return no results, falls through to SerpAPI (US-003)
5-second AbortController timeout on the OFF API call
Lint passes

userStories.title: SerpAPI Tertiary Fallback
userStories.description: As a developer, I need SerpAPI retained as a last-resort fallback so that image search still works for non-grocery, non-Walmart items.
acceptanceCriteria: When both Walmart and Open Food Facts return zero results, the Edge Function calls SerpAPI Google Images (same logic as current `search-images/index.ts`)
Returns `{ results: [...], source: "serpapi" }` when SerpAPI results are used
If all three sources return nothing, returns `{ results: [], source: "none" }`
The existing `SERPAPI_KEY` Supabase secret is reused — no new secrets needed
5-second AbortController timeout on the SerpAPI call
Lint passes

userStories.title: Update Client-Side Service to Call New Edge Function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need `imageSearch.js` to call the new `search-products` endpoint instead of `search-images`, maintaining the same return type so ImagePicker works without changes.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/services/imageSearch.js` updated: endpoint changes from `/search-images` to `/search-products`
Return type unchanged: `Array<{ url: string, thumbnail: string, title: string }>`
`searchImages()` function signature and behavior unchanged — callers (ImagePicker) require no modification
Error handling unchanged — returns `[]` on failure
Old `search-images` Edge Function is NOT deleted yet (kept for rollback safety)
Lint passes
userStories.testIntensityReason: Simple endpoint URL change with no logic changes

userStories.title: Update CORS and Environment Configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the new Edge Function deployed and CORS configured so it works in both local dev and production.
acceptanceCriteria: `ALLOWED_ORIGINS` in new Edge Function includes `https://shoppinglistai.vercel.app` and `http://localhost:4000`
Also include `http://localhost:5173` for backward compatibility (Vite default port)
Edge Function deployed to Supabase
Supabase secrets set: `WALMART_CONSUMER_ID`, `WALMART_PRIVATE_KEY`, `WALMART_KEY_VERSION`
Verify search works in production (shoppinglistai.vercel.app)
Verify search works in local dev (localhost:4000)
Lint passes
userStories.testIntensityReason: Deployment and CORS verification across environments — must confirm end-to-end in production

userStories.title: Update project.json Integration Entry
userStories.description: As a developer, I need `docs/project.json` updated to reflect the new primary image search provider.
acceptanceCriteria: `integrations` array in `docs/project.json`: change SerpAPI entry purpose to "Fallback image search (tertiary, via Edge Function)"
Add new integration entry for Walmart Affiliate API: `{ "name": "walmart-affiliate", "purpose": "Primary product image search (via Supabase Edge Function)" }`
Add new integration entry for Open Food Facts: `{ "name": "openfoodfacts", "purpose": "Secondary fallback image search for grocery items (free, no API key)" }`
Lint passes
